title: Weber Grill Turner (40cm), Made of Stainless Steel, with Comfort Grip, Dishwasher Safe for Easy Cleaning, with Loop for Hanging - Black (6318)
features: BBQ SPATULA: This durable stainless steel spatula makes it easy to lift and flip burgers on a grill, ensuring perfectly balanced cooks and efficient grilling sessions
ERGONOMIC GRILLING: This grill spatula features an ergonomic comfort-hold handle to ensure total comfort when cooking, and a firm grip for safety and efficiency
DISHWASHER-FRIENDLY: This spatula is dishwasher-safe, and can be slotted in with your other utensils to keep it in great working order with ease
HIGHLY DURABLE: The stainless steel blade of this spatula is highly durable, and will keep looking great and functioning well even after lots of regular use
WEBER QUALITY: Weber has been celebrating BBQs and accessories since 1952, boasting an unmatched wealth of knowledge, experience, and passion to help you towards perfect outdoor cooking
